entity.summary: EOS and WAX ecosystem decentralized exchange candidate identified during the HEI active DEX backlog continuation and currently treated as an active DEX record.
entity.notes: Added as a low-confidence active DEX/protocol record during the verified-unadded backlog continuation after Agni Finance. Evidence is limited to the official domain and database-style references, so this record should be improved later if stronger launch/history evidence is found.
